# model.query_emission { #tslai.model.query_emission }

```python
tslai.model.query_emission(pi)
```

Flat / root-frequency emission for an unlabelled query tip (CLAUDE.md §2.2).

## Parameters {.doc-section .doc-section-parameters}

<code>[**pi**]{.parameter-name} [:]{.parameter-annotation-sep} [[array_like](`array_like`)]{.parameter-annotation}</code>

:   ``(K,)`` root frequencies, used directly as the query tip's emission.

## Returns {.doc-section .doc-section-returns}

<code>[]{.parameter-name} [:]{.parameter-annotation-sep} [[numpy](`numpy`).[ndarray](`numpy.ndarray`)]{.parameter-annotation}</code>

:   ``(K,)`` emission likelihood vector (a copy of ``pi``).
